item.title: The Toddler's Last Moments Were Nightmarish
item.description: I know I cover a lot of cases where children are hurt and killed. The sis a subject case to my heart and I feel the monster who do these crimes need to be known. The tragic murder of Riley Ann Sawyers AKA Baby Grace is a case that will shock and upset the most hardened true crime fan. Kimberly Dawn Trenor is the mother in this case. She married a master called Clyde Zeigler Jr. and what unfolded is just horrific. Em x

media:content.media:title: The Toddler's Last Moments Were Nightmarish
media:content.media:description: I know I cover a lot of cases where children are hurt and killed. The sis a subject case to my heart and I feel the monster who do these crimes need to be known. The tragic murder of Riley Ann Sawyers AKA Baby Grace is a case that will shock and upset the most hardened true crime fan. Kimberly Dawn Trenor is the mother in this case. She married a master called Clyde Zeigler Jr. and what unfolded is just horrific. Em x

item.title: Charles Schmid - The Pier Piper of Tucson
item.description: In 1960s Arizona, a killer was on the loose. He hid in plain sight among the high school teenagers who idolised him. However, he was no teenager – he used his age and experience to manipulate those around him with deadly consequences. Many would know about his heinous crimes, but no one would report him – such was his hold over those who hero worshipped him. This is what happens when a narcissistic psychopath refuses to grow up and instead indulges his warped desires. This is the case of Charles Schmid – the Pied Piper of Tucson

media:content.media:title: Charles Schmid - The Pier Piper of Tucson
media:content.media:description: In 1960s Arizona, a killer was on the loose. He hid in plain sight among the high school teenagers who idolised him. However, he was no teenager – he used his age and experience to manipulate those around him with deadly consequences. Many would know about his heinous crimes, but no one would report him – such was his hold over those who hero worshipped him. This is what happens when a narcissistic psychopath refuses to grow up and instead indulges his warped desires. This is the case of Charles Schmid – the Pied Piper of Tucson

item.title: He Picked the WRONG Victim to Mess With!
item.description: Gary, an absolute trooper! How he managed to stand strong for that long is just amazing! What are your thoughts on this absolutely crazy case?

media:content.media:title: He Picked the WRONG Victim to Mess With!
media:content.media:description: Gary, an absolute trooper! How he managed to stand strong for that long is just amazing! What are your thoughts on this absolutely crazy case?

item.title: Shanna Golyar Pretended To Be Cari Farver
item.description: In 2012, Nebraska mom Cari Farver vanished after dating David Krupa, then “Cari” began flooding him and Shanna Golyar with vicious texts, threats, and emails for years. There were vandalism attacks, a suspicious house fire, and even a shooting—until investigators uncovered the shocking truth: Cari had been murdered, and Shanna had been impersonating her to control David, frame others, and keep the chaos alive. How disturbing is it that a killer can “keep someone alive” online just to hide what they’ve done?

media:content.media:title: Shanna Golyar Pretended To Be Cari Farver
media:content.media:description: In 2012, Nebraska mom Cari Farver vanished after dating David Krupa, then “Cari” began flooding him and Shanna Golyar with vicious texts, threats, and emails for years. There were vandalism attacks, a suspicious house fire, and even a shooting—until investigators uncovered the shocking truth: Cari had been murdered, and Shanna had been impersonating her to control David, frame others, and keep the chaos alive. How disturbing is it that a killer can “keep someone alive” online just to hide what they’ve done?
